title: CBB Cyber Security Requirements Letter EDS/NA/C/03/2025
summary: Directs all CBB licensees to patch public-facing systems, enable MFA for critical systems, maintain and test backups, report suspicious activity to NCSC, and comply with NCSC Protect Your Organization recommendations in addition to CBB Rulebook requirements.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Immediate cybersecurity requirements for all CBB licensees.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.critical_infrastructure: Immediate cybersecurity requirements for all CBB licensees.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.incident_reporting: Requires suspicious cyber activity reporting to NCSC by CBB licensees.
theme_notes.digital_finance.payments_emoney: Cybersecurity requirements for all CBB licensees including payment providers.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB cyber risk modules and NCSC Protect Your Organization guidance
